final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input CIN,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output COUT,
    output SUM
);// Implementing full adder using behavioral modeling
    wire not_sum = A ^ B ^ CIN;
    assign SUM = not_sum;
    assign COUT = (A & B) | (B & CIN) | (A & CIN);
    
endmodule
